REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1411 Church St., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Mar-29-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Peggy O'Dowd appearing for trustee. Bid is increased to $1,026,550.00. Additional bond of $1,106,000.00 is required. Counsel to submit order with bond. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1411 Church St., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Mar-08-2006 Continued To Mar-29-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Peggy O'Dowd appearing for Debra Dolch, trustee. On 1411 Church Street, S.F., bid is increased to 1,100,000.00. On 1415-1417 Church Street, S.F., bid is increased to $1,125,000.00. Additional bond is required on both sales. Counsel will provide the court with the amount of the bond. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1415-17 Church St., San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Mar-08-2006 Written Order Received
MINI MINUTES: Counsel and bidder on the 1411 Church Street property returned to court asking for clarification on the bid increment. Court has made an error on calculation. Matter is continued to 3/29. Counsel to notice the hearing. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
